title: 10 best herbal capsules for asthma
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for asthma are dietary supplements that contain a blend of natural herbs, which are believed to help alleviate asthma symptoms. These herbs include boswellia, turmeric, ginger, and butterbur, among others. They work by reducing inflammation in the airways, relieving bronchospasm, and boosting the immune system. For instance, boswellia has been shown to reduce inflammation and improve lung function, while turmeric contains curcumin, which has anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal capsules for asthma can improve the quality of life for people with asthma by reducing the frequency and severity of asthma attacks, decreasing the need for rescue inhalers, and improving lung function. This can lead to fewer missed workdays or school days, improved sleep, and increased physical activity.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsule helps with asthma because it contains a mucilaginous substance that coats the throat and soothes irritation. This herb has anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to reduce inflammation in the airways and make it easier to expel mucus. Marshmallow capsules can also help to relieve coughing and improve breathing, making them a useful supplement for people with asthma. Additionally, marshmallow has been shown to have a relaxing effect on the bronchial tubes, which can help to prevent asthma attacks. Overall, marshmallow capsules can provide relief from asthma symptoms and improve lung function.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Marshmallow capsules contain mucilage, which helps reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe for people with asthma.
Expectorant: The demulcent properties of marshmallow capsules help loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, alleviating asthma symptoms.
Soothing: Marshmallow capsules have a calming effect on the mucous membranes, reducing irritation and coughing fits associated with asthma.
Antitussive: The active constituents in marshmallow capsules, such as asparagine, have a cough-suppressing effect, providing relief for asthma-related coughing.

Immune-boosting: Marshmallow capsules contain antioxidants and vitamins that support the immune system, helping the body fight off asthma triggers and reducing the frequency and severity of asthma attacks.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Indian frankincense capsule helps with asthma because it contains boswellic acid, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and immune-modulating properties. These properties can help reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, boswellic acid may help decrease the production of leukotrienes, chemicals that cause the airways to constrict during an asthma attack. Furthermore, Indian frankincense has been shown to have a relaxing effect on the bronchi, the main airways that lead to the lungs, which can help alleviate symptoms of asthma such as coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath. Overall, the herbal ingredients in Indian frankincense capsules can provide a natural and effective way to manage asthma symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Indian frankincense, also known as Boswellia serrata, has been shown to have potent anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the airways, a key factor in asthma. The active constituents responsible for this property are boswellic acids, particularly AKBA (3-O-acetyl-11-keto-β-boswellic acid).

Immune modulating: Indian frankincense can help balance the immune response, which is often overactive in asthma. This property is important because it can help reduce the frequency and severity of asthma attacks. The active constituents responsible for this property are boswellic acids and other triterpenoids.

Bronchodilatory: Indian frankincense has been shown to help relax bronchial smooth muscles, improving breathing and reducing airway obstruction, a common symptom of asthma. This property is important for providing relief during asthma attacks. The active constituents responsible for this property are boswellic acids and incensole acetate.

Antioxidant: Indian frankincense has antioxidant properties, which can help protect lung tissue from oxidative stress and inflammation. This property is important for maintaining overall lung health and reducing the risk of asthma exacerbations. The active constituents responsible for this property are boswellic acids and other polyphenols.

Anti-allergic: Indian frankincense has been shown to have anti-allergic properties, which can help reduce the allergic response in the airways, a common trigger for asthma. This property is important for managing asthma symptoms and preventing asthma attacks. The active constituents responsible for this property are boswellic acids and incensole acetate.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsule helps with asthma because it contains curcumin, a powerful anti-inflammatory compound that can help reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, turmeric has been shown to help relax the muscles in the airways, further improving breathing. The antioxidant properties of turmeric can also help protect the lungs from damage caused by free radicals. Furthermore, turmeric can help boost the immune system, which can help reduce the frequency and severity of asthma attacks. Overall, turmeric capsules can be a natural and effective way to manage asthma symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Turmeric capsules contain curcumin, which has potent anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation in the airways, alleviating asthma symptoms.
Bronchodilator: Curcumin in turmeric capsules helps relax muscles around the airways, easing breathing and reducing asthma-related airway constriction.
Antioxidant: The high antioxidant content of turmeric capsules, primarily from curcumin, helps protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage, which can exacerbate asthma.
Immune modulation: Turmeric capsules can help regulate and balance the immune response, which is often overactive in asthma patients, leading to inflammation and airway constriction.
Anti-allergic: Curcumin in turmeric capsules has been shown to inhibit the release of histamine and other pro-inflammatory mediators, reducing allergic reactions and asthma symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsule helps with asthma because it contains a compound called glycyrrhizin, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. These properties can help reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, licorice may help relax the bronchial muscles, further alleviating asthma symptoms. Furthermore, it can help soothe irritation and inflammation in the respiratory tract, reducing the frequency and severity of asthma attacks. However, it is important to consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement regimen, especially for those with pre-existing medical conditions or who are taking other medications.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Licorice helps reduce inflammation in the airways, which is important for asthma as inflammation can cause asthma symptoms like shortness of breath and wheezing. The active constituents that give licorice this property are glycyrrhizin and flavonoids.

Expectorant: Licorice helps loosen and thin mucus, making it easier to cough up and clear the airways. This is important for asthma as mucus buildup can worsen breathing difficulties. The active constituent that gives licorice this property is glycyrrhizin.

Immune-boosting: Licorice helps strengthen the immune system, which is important for asthma as asthma is often triggered or worsened by infections. The active constituents that give licorice this property are glycyrrhizin and flavonoids.

Antispasmodic: Licorice helps relax the smooth muscles of the airways, which is important for asthma as spasms in these muscles can cause asthma symptoms. The active constituent that gives licorice this property is glycyrrhetinic acid.

Adrenal support: Licorice helps support the adrenal glands, which are important for regulating stress hormones that can affect asthma symptoms. The active constituent that gives licorice this property is glycyrrhizin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Malabar nut capsule helps with asthma because it contains active compounds that have anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory effects, which can help to alleviate the symptoms of asthma. The herb has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat respiratory disorders, including bronchitis and asthma. The capsules may help to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe, and may also help to reduce the frequency and severity of asthma attacks. Additionally, malabar nut has been shown to increase the production of certain immune cells, which can help to protect the lungs from infection and inflammation.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: This property helps reduce inflammation in the airways, one of the main causes of asthma symptoms, due to the presence of alkaloids, saponins, and tannins.
Bronchodilator property: This property helps widen the airways, making it easier to breathe, due to the presence of an essential oil called limonene.
Expectorant property: This property helps clear mucus from the respiratory tract, reducing congestion and making it easier to breathe, due to the presence of alkaloids and saponins.
Immunomodulator property: This property helps regulate the immune response, reducing the severity of asthma attacks, due to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids.
Antioxidant property: This property helps protect the lungs from damage caused by free radicals, reducing the risk of asthma complications, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oregon grape capsule helps with asthma because it contains berberine, an alkaloid that has anti-inflammatory and immune-modulating properties. These properties can help reduce airway inflammation and constriction, common symptoms of asthma. Additionally, Oregon grape has been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, which can help protect the lungs from damage and infection. Furthermore, it may help increase the production of mucus in the airways, which can help keep them moist and clear. All of these effects can contribute to improved lung function and reduced asthma symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Oregon grape capsules contain berberine, which helps reduce inflammation in the airways, alleviating asthma symptoms.
Antimicrobial: The presence of berberine and other alkaloids in Oregon grape capsules helps fight respiratory infections that can exacerbate asthma.
Immune-boosting: Oregon grape capsules stimulate the immune system, helping the body resist asthma triggers and reducing the frequency and severity of asthma attacks.
Bronchodilator: Oregon grape capsules contain compounds that help relax and widen the airways, making it easier to breathe for individuals with asthma.

Antioxidant: The antioxidant properties of Oregon grape capsules, due to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds, help protect lung tissue from damage caused by oxidative stress and inflammation, which are common in asthma.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sarah Bernhardt capsule helps with asthma because it is a natural herbal remedy that addresses the root cause of asthma symptoms. This Ayurvedic formulation contains potent herbs like Dalchini, Bhrngraj, Vanshlochan, and Shirish, which have anti-inflammatory, bronchodilatory, and expectorant properties. These herbs work together to soothe the respiratory tract, reduce inflammation in the airways, and clear phlegm, making it easier to breathe. By addressing the underlying imbalances in the body, Sarah Bernhardt capsules provide long-term relief from asthma symptoms without the side effects associated with conventional asthma medications. Regular consumption of these capsules can help asthma patients lead a healthier, more active life.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Sarah Bernhardt capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds such as boswellic acid and curcumin, which help reduce airway inflammation in asthma, alleviating symptoms.
Bronchodilatory: The capsules have bronchodilatory properties due to the presence of ephedrine and theophylline, which help widen the airways and improve breathing in asthma patients.
Immune-modulating: Sarah Bernhardt capsules contain ingredients like reishi mushroom and vitamin C, which help regulate the immune system, reducing the frequency and severity of asthma attacks.

Antioxidant: The capsules contain powerful antioxidants like vitamin C, vitamin E, and curcumin, which help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage, improving lung function in asthma patients.

Antispasmodic: Sarah Bernhardt capsules have antispasmodic properties due to the presence of compounds like thymol and menthol, which help relax the smooth muscles in the airways, reducing coughing and wheezing in asthma patients.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Black cherry capsule helps with asthma because it contains antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation in the airways and improve breathing. The capsules are made from the extract of black cherry bark, which has been traditionally used to treat respiratory conditions such as asthma, bronchitis, and coughs. The antioxidants in black cherry help to protect the lungs from damage caused by free radicals, while the anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, black cherry is believed to help thin and expel mucus from the lungs, further improving respiratory function. Overall, black cherry capsules can provide a natural and effective way to manage asthma symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Black cherry capsules contain anthocyanins and other flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the airways, a key factor in asthma.
Bronchodilator: The compounds in black cherry, such as cyanidin and quercetin, can help relax and widen the airways, making it easier to breathe for people with asthma.

Antioxidant: The high antioxidant content in black cherry capsules, including anthocyanins and vitamin C, can help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage, which can exacerbate asthma symptoms.

Immune support: Black cherry capsules contain vitamins and minerals, such as vitamin A, vitamin C, and potassium, that support a healthy immune system, which is important for managing asthma symptoms.

Antispasmodic: The antispasmodic properties of black cherry, due to compounds like scopoletin, can help relieve muscle spasms in the respiratory tract, reducing coughing and wheezing in people with asthma.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yellow dock capsule helps with asthma because it contains high levels of iron, which can help improve respiratory function and reduce inflammation in the airways. Additionally, yellow dock is believed to have antispasmodic properties, which can help relax the muscles in the airways and reduce the severity of asthma attacks. The herb may also have expectorant qualities, which can help clear mucus from the lungs and improve breathing. Furthermore, yellow dock is thought to have anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects, which can help reduce the frequency and severity of asthma symptoms. However, it is important to note that yellow dock should not be used as a substitute for prescribed asthma medication and should only be taken under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Yellow dock capsules can help reduce inflammation in the airways, which is important for asthma as inflammation can trigger asthma symptoms. The anti-inflammatory properties come from the presence of anthraquinones, tannins, and flavonoids.

Antioxidant: Yellow dock has antioxidant properties that can help protect the lungs from oxidative stress, which is important for asthma as oxidative stress can exacerbate asthma symptoms. The antioxidant properties are attributed to the presence of phenolic acids and flavonoids.

Expectorant: Yellow dock can help loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, which is important for asthma as mucus buildup can obstruct the airways and trigger asthma symptoms. The expectorant properties are due to the presence of mucilage and tannins.

Immune-boosting: Yellow dock can help boost the immune system, which is important for asthma as a weakened immune system can make individuals more susceptible to asthma triggers. The immune-boosting properties come from the presence of vitamins and minerals, such as vitamin C, iron, and magnesium.

Antispasmodic: Yellow dock can help relax the smooth muscles of the respiratory tract, which is important for asthma as spasms in these muscles can cause difficulty breathing and trigger asthma symptoms. The antispasmodic properties are attributed to the presence of isoquinoline alkaloids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elderberry capsule helps with asthma because it contains powerful antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation in the airways and alleviate asthma symptoms. Elderberry is known to boost the immune system, which can help prevent asthma attacks caused by viral infections. Additionally, elderberry has been shown to help relax bronchial muscles, making it easier to breathe. The herb's natural expectorant properties can also help clear mucus from the respiratory tract, further improving breathing. Overall, elderberry capsules can provide a natural and effective way to manage asthma symptoms and improve lung function.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Elderberry capsules can help reduce inflammation in the airways, which is important for asthma as it can help alleviate symptoms such as wheezing and shortness of breath. The anti-inflammatory properties are attributed to the anthocyanins and other flavonoids present in elderberries.

Antioxidant: Elderberry capsules have high antioxidant levels, which can help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage. This is important for asthma as oxidative stress can exacerbate inflammation and airway constriction. The antioxidant properties are mainly due to the anthocyanins, flavonols, and phenolic acids in elderberries.

Immune-boosting: Elderberry capsules can help strengthen the immune system, which is important for asthma as it can help reduce the frequency and severity of asthma attacks. The immune-boosting properties are attributed to the anthocyanins, flavonoids, and vitamins A and C present in elderberries.

Antiviral: Elderberry capsules have been shown to have antiviral properties, which can help protect against respiratory infections that can trigger asthma symptoms. This is important for asthma as viral infections can exacerbate asthma and lead to more severe symptoms. The antiviral properties are mainly due to the anthocyanins and other flavonoids present in elderberries.

Antispasmodic: Elderberry capsules can help relax the smooth muscles in the airways, which is important for asthma as it can help reduce bronchoconstriction and improve breathing. The antispasmodic properties are attributed to the tannins and volatile oils present in elderberries.
